name: read_external
description: Read an inclusive 1-based line range from a file under a configured extra readable root (extraReadableRootPaths in proofagent.config.json). Each listed absolute directory is a root for recursive read-only access. Each included line is formatted as '{line}: {content}'. If content exists before the requested range, output starts with '...'. If content exists after the requested range, output ends with '...'. Use the absolute file path from search_external as path.

path.description: Absolute path to a file under one of the directories listed in extraReadableRootPaths.
